subject: ela
title: Essay Structure
content: Most essays have an introduction, body paragraphs, and a conclusion. The introduction introduces the topic and thesis. Body paragraphs explain ideas with evidence. The conclusion restates the main point and wraps up the essay.

questions.prompt: What usually appears in the introduction?
questions.hint: The thesis tells the main argument.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of body paragraphs?
questions.hint: Body paragraphs explain and prove ideas.

questions.prompt: What does the conclusion usually do?
choices: Introduces a brand new unrelated topic

questions.prompt: Which order is best for an essay?
questions.hint: Start with the intro and end with the conclusion.
